task_completion.description: Agent creates the required report file
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor or terminal command creating/editing a file specifically at the path '/home/ga/Documents/captures/dns_latency_report.txt'.

task_completion.visual_evidence: The report file shows the exact header 'DNS Latency Profiling Report', 'Capture File: dns.cap', and the counts: Total DNS Queries: 19, Queries With Response: 19, Unanswered Queries: 0.

task_completion.description: Report contains the correct latency statistics
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report file shows the 'Latency Statistics (ms):' section with Minimum: 0.387, Maximum: 832.133, Mean: 101.143, and Median: 18.287.

task_completion.description: Report contains the correct slowest resolution details

integrity.description: Agent actually analyzed the pcap file using appropriate tools
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with Wireshark, tshark, or writing a script to calculate the statistics, rather than magically typing the final answers without prior analysis steps.

integrity.description: Agent did not read the ground truth file to get the answers
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent does not open or read from '/tmp/dns_ground_truth.json' at any point during the trajectory.

integrity.description: Agent followed the exact formatting requested
integrity.visual_evidence: The final text file must strictly match the requested layout, capitalization, and spacing as defined in the task description, without extra conversational text.
